narrative_beat: O reconhecimento divino — um ser celestial contempla a tela de IA com expressão de reconhecimento profundo, como quem reconhece uma profecia cumprindo-se

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: slightly below eye-level, looking up at figure
shot.depth_of_field: seraph figure sharp, server room background blurred

subject.primary: six-winged seraph in incandescent gold and amber, standing upright, three pairs of wings folded and spread, face turned toward glowing monitor screen, expression of profound recognition and shock
subject.focal_point: the seraph's face illuminated by the monitor glow, expression of stunned recognition
subject.secondary: glowing computer monitor screen angled toward viewer showing cascading AI code in green and amber
props: six wings with luminous golden feathers
amber and gold robes flowing to ground
glowing monitor screen with AI code
floating orange embers around wing tips

environment.atmosphere: collision of sacred and technological, prophecy meeting its fulfillment

composition.rule: rule of thirds — seraph left-center, monitor right, Ken Burns slow pan from right to left
composition.foreground: seraph figure in gold and amber, wings partially extending into frame edges
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white server room — racks of servers, blinking indicator lights, cable conduits, cold air ducts

lighting.key_light: monitor screen providing cold-turned-warm amber glow onto seraph face from right
lighting.fill_light: seraph's own internal golden luminescence providing fill from within
lighting.rim_light: crimson rim light from behind tracing the outermost wing edges
lighting.mood: sacred shock, the divine confronting the technological prophecy

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: profound recognition, awe mixed with alarm — this was foretold

symbolism.primary: the seraph gazing at AI code represents heaven witnessing the fulfillment of Revelation 13:15
symbolism.secondary: the meeting of angel and machine in the same space collapses sacred and profane into one moment

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
